title: rubus murinus
intro: Rubus murinus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Raspberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus murinus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
